overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through rainy London streets in autumn. The character moves from a leaf-covered sidewalk past historic stone buildings toward Big Ben, which displays a glowing red 'SEVERE' warning alert. Futuristic drones fly around the tower as traffic including a red double-decker bus passes by on the wet roads.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a low-angle view of wet pavement covered in autumn leaves. The camera rises to follow a character walking along a narrow sidewalk beside a historic stone building. Orange construction barriers line the left side of the path as the character moves forward.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk as the view opens to reveal the street and distant Parliament buildings. A person with a purple umbrella passes by closely. The historic stone building remains on the right while the road with parked cars becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city street with view of Parliament and Big Ben

futuristic drones become visible flying overhead near the clock tower

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wider sidewalk with a clear view of Big Ben and Parliament ahead. The street is lined with autumn trees and moderate traffic including black taxis. Futuristic drones appear flying overhead as the character approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with iconic clock tower and digital warning display

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop at the intersection to observe Big Ben with the severe warning alert while traffic passes

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the intersection as Big Ben dominates the view with its illuminated 'SEVERE' warning sign glowing red. Multiple futuristic drones swarm around the tower. A classic red double-decker bus and black taxis drive through the wet intersection as the camera focuses on the iconic landmark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, leaf-strewn sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide, futuristic urban intersection dominated by Big Ben. It begins with a low-angle view of wet pavement and autumn leaves, rising to follow a character walking past a historic stone building and orange construction barriers. As the character progresses, the view expands to reveal the street and distant Parliament buildings, passing a pedestrian with a purple umbrella while parked cars appear on the left. The scene then opens further onto a wider sidewalk lined with autumn trees and black taxis, with futuristic drones beginning to emerge in the sky overhead. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the intersection, focusing on Big Ben as it looms large with a glowing red SEVERE warning sign while a red double-decker bus drives through the rain-slicked streets.
